data.title: Bitcoin slides below $90K as crypto correction becomes one of the worst since 2017
data.description:
Bitcoin plunges below $90K, erasing all gains for 2025. ETF outflows and leverage-driven liquidations deepen the selloff. Sentiment hits “Extreme Fear” as crypto markets shed over $1T. Bitcoin crashed below $90,000 on Wednesday, marking a devastating 28% decline from its early October peak above $126,000
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bitcoin-slides-below-90k-as-crypto-correction-becomes-one-of-the-worst-since-2017/

data.title: Vitalik Buterin says quantum computers will break crypto security by 2030
data.description:
Ethereum creator Vitalik Buterin told developers in Buenos Aires on Tuesday that quantum computers will have the ability to break the cryptography holding Bitcoin and others as early as 2028. Vitalik said “elliptic curves are going to die,” pointing straight at the math that secures wallets, signatures, and every transaction on today’s major blockchains. The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/vitalik-quantum-computers-crypto-security/

data.title: Russians won’t rush to the digital ruble, central bank admits
data.description:
Mass adoption of Russia’s upcoming digital ruble is not to be expected, according to one of its monetary authority’s high-ranking representatives. The central bank digital currency will mostly benefit the state and the economy, but ordinary Russians are unlikely to keep a lot of value in the CBDC. That would be unprofitable, the top official […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russians-wont-rush-to-the-digital-ruble-central-bank-admits/

data.title: Trump Says Powell Has “Real Mental Problems” as Fed Tensions Explode Publicly — Here Is Why the Clash Just Escalated
data.description:
Former President Donald Trump has publicly criticized Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell by stating that Powell possesses "real mental problems," amidst rising tensions between the two regarding monetary policy. This escalation in conflict highlights not only the ongoing disagreements over interest rates and economic strategies but also underscores the deteriorating relationship between the Trump administration and the Federal Reserve. Here is an analysis of the factors contributing to this increasing clash and its potential implications for the economy and financial markets moving forward.
source: https://blocknews.com/trump-says-powell-has-real-mental-problems-as-fed-tensions-explode-publicly-here-is-why-the-clash-just-escalated/

data.title: Bitcoin Traders Now See 50% Chance of BTC Falling Under $80,000 in 2026: Here is Why
data.description:
Bitcoin traders are currently evaluating the potential future movements of the cryptocurrency market, and they have assigned a 50% probability to the scenario where Bitcoin (BTC) could drop below the significant threshold of $80,000 by the year 2026. In this article, we will explore the various factors and market dynamics that are contributing to this assessment, shedding light on the reasons behind traders' expectations and the potential implications for those involved in the Bitcoin ecosystem.

data.description:

data.title: Big win for crypto ETFs as SEC approves Bitwise 10 listing on NYSE Arca
data.description:
The Securities and Exchange Commission has granted formal approval for NYSE Arca to list and trade the Bitwise 10 Crypto Index ETF. The approval, issued on November 18, 2025, concludes a multistep review process that included multiple comment periods, procedural extensions, and a final amendment submitted by the exchange in July. SEC confirms compliance after […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sec-approves-bitwise-10-listing-on-nyse-arca/

data.title: U.S. cancels October jobs report, making Fed’s December rate cut odds surge
data.description:
The Bureau of Labor Statistics said Wednesday it will not publish the October jobs report, after a 44‑day government shutdown stopped workers from gathering any of the numbers. The agency said the October payroll count will now be bundled with November’s release, and it made clear the October unemployment rate won’t show up in that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/u-s-cancels-october-jobs-report/
